title: Pasta from Múcsony - a social economy project
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is HUNGARY. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 17 HU. Homemade pasta free of additives and artificial substances. The pasta is from only two ingredients: flour and eggs. They produce the raw materials needed for production almost entirely locally (they also have eggs and their own mills). Their products are also sold in nearby local grocery stores. The product is beautifully packaged and high quality. The project operates within the framework of a social enterprise for social and economic purposes.

title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Northern Medium Mountains. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is Múcsony. Múcsony is a village in Borsod-Abaúj-Zemplén county, Kazincbarcika district. It is located in the valley of the Szuha and Sajó, 23 km north of Miskolc (the nearest larger town). There used to be a brick factory here, followed by a mine that closed in the early 1990s.

title: Interest on this VC
description: In the framework of a local social economy public employment programme, run by the local authority, they produce eggs then make pasta in a small processing plant. They also have a small mill to produce flower. Pasta is partly used by the local public kitchen, partly sold in nearby local grocery stores. The project provides employment for disadvantaged social groups (Roma mainly). The social enterprise implemented by the local government is an innovative way to ensure the employment of disadvantaged people living in the village. A high level of trust and co-operative culture has been developed in order to achieve both social and economic goals in the context of sustainable production.

title: Challenges
description: Climate change (warming, new pests, extreme weather conditions). Various viruses can appear that can interfere with egg production. Narrowing sales channels. Problems of social enterprise labor supply and work ethic. Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Current and Predicted. This VC is classified as Traditional and Innovative.

title: Innovation
description: The type of innovation of this VC (Value Chain) is Endogenous and Exogenous. Pasta preparation and hen keeping, flour grinding are traditional activities. The VC is implemented within the framework of a social enterprise, initiated by the local municipality (to provide work opportunities for locals and to gain some money). They are able to produce relatively large quantities of pasta, which they sell in nearby and local grocery stores. The product is nicely packaged and high quality. Their products are also preservative-free and healthy. The innovation is related to New governance systems. The land use systems involved are Cropland and hen house. The local assets include Natural and social.
